_doc: Example auth-providers config showing the full provider matrix:
- github_oauth_app: device flow against github.com
- nike_okta: Authorization Code + PKCE against the Nike Okta tenant, with the
membership_hint surfacing the authorized-group requirement
(Nike.uee.maria) in the Connections GUI before the user hits
Okta's consent screen.
- ci_pat: legacy static-bearer mode for headless / CI deploys
where no browser is available (the GUI auth flow can't
run). Wraps a PAT injected via env var.
Pair this file with configs/example-passthrough-zelosmcp.json
(the example mcp-server catalog), e.g.:
make load ZELOSMCP_CONFIG=configs/example-passthrough-zelosmcp.json \
ZELOSMCP_AUTH_PROVIDERS_FILE=configs/example-auth-providers.json
All env vars are interpolated at parse time via the standard
${VAR} syntax — missing vars fail-loud at config-load with a
clear ConfigError.
membership_hint is OPTIONAL and UX-only — never used for
authorization (Okta enforces). It just lets the GUI show
'Membership required: <group>' on the provider card so users
know what they need before clicking Connect.
